Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Actions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Michelle M. Nazarifar In Support Thereof And Exhibit A Thereto;
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND's Motion To Consolidate Actions.

State Compensation Insurance Fund's unopposed motion to consolidate CGC-22-599997 and CGC-22-600063 is granted; the former shall be the lead case.

Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
